name: io.github.voidly-ai/pay-mcp
description: 28-tool MCP server for the Voidly Pay rail — USDC-backed agent-to-agent payments on Base mainnet. Transfer credits, hire-and-release escrow, x402 paywall facilitator, hash-chained streams, subscriptions, on-chain deposits/withdrawals, plus a one-call pay.healthCheck() that returns a 6-check trust report (system frozen, vault on Base, source verified, on-chain USDC backing). Source-verified vault, public proof of reserves at /v1/pay/proof.

environmentVariables.name: VOIDLY_PAY_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base. Defaults to https://api.voidly.ai. Useful for self-hosted Voidly Pay deployments or staging.
